hero.headline: Build your own AI stack — fully self-hosted
hero.subheadline: Production-ready guides, workflows & tools for homelab operators and privacy-conscious teams.

products.section_subtitle: Battle-tested tools from a production system

ai_blueprint.title: AI Agent Team Blueprint
ai_blueprint.subtitle: Real architecture from a production system. 4 Claude agents, Mattermost as hub, n8n for automation.
ai_blueprint.short_desc: Complete blueprint: 4 Claude agents + Mattermost hub. Templates, code, security rules from a production system. Ready to use.

n8n_bundle.title: n8n Starter Bundle
n8n_bundle.subtitle: AI automation for European businesses — no OpenAI dependency, fully self-hosted.
n8n_bundle.short_desc: 3 battle-tested n8n workflows: Stripe delivery, local AI (Ollama), GDPR Art.30 register. GDPR-safe, self-hosted, ready to import.

grafana_pack.title: Grafana Dashboard Pack
grafana_pack.subtitle: Battle-tested monitoring dashboards for homelab & DevOps — Docker Swarm, Prometheus, Node Exporter.
grafana_pack.short_desc: 6 Grafana dashboards: Infrastructure, Docker Swarm, Node Exporter, Network, Services, Alerts. Import & done. Prometheus-ready.

gdpr_bundle.title: GDPR Art.30 Compliance Bundle
gdpr_bundle.subtitle: n8n workflow with REST API — set up once, document your data processing activities properly.
gdpr_bundle.short_desc: GDPR Art.30 compliant processing register as n8n workflow. Validates all mandatory fields. Self-hosted, no cloud dependency.

playbook.title: Playbook01: The Local AI Stack
playbook.subtitle: Build a production-ready, fully self-hosted AI infrastructure — Proxmox, Docker Swarm, n8n, Ollama, Mattermost, and more.
playbook.short_desc: Complete guide to building your own local AI stack. Proxmox + Docker Swarm + n8n + Ollama. No cloud needed.

mcp_bundle.title: Homelab MCP Bundle
mcp_bundle.subtitle: Give Claude (or any AI) full access to your homelab — Proxmox, n8n, Mattermost, Uptime Kuma, Ollama, Grafana, Portainer, AdGuard.
mcp_bundle.short_desc: 8 open-source MCP servers, 51 tools. Connect Claude to your entire homelab stack. MIT licensed.

komplett_bundle.title: AI Engineering Komplett-Bundle
komplett_bundle.subtitle: All 6 products in one bundle — save 60% vs. individual purchase.
komplett_bundle.short_desc: Complete AI stack toolkit: agents, n8n workflows, Grafana dashboards, GDPR compliance, local AI playbook + 8 MCP servers. Best value.

about.headline: Built by engineers, for engineers
about.body: AI-Engineering.at creates production-ready tools and guides for self-hosted AI infrastructure. Everything we sell, we run ourselves — in a live homelab with real workloads.

self_hosted.title: Self-hosted first
self_hosted.desc: No lock-in. Your data stays on your servers.

gdpr.title: GDPR by design
gdpr.desc: Built for European teams. No US cloud dependencies.

production.title: Production-tested
production.desc: Everything runs in our own production environment before we ship it.

footer.tagline: Self-hosted AI infrastructure — built for the real world.
